feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Master Data Governance
feed.subtitle: SAP Master Data Governance Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: how to display error message for choosing incorrect CR type?
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I am working on some task.

When user selects a material, clicks on copy , Change request pop will come. If an incorrect CR type is selected , how to display error message on the screen?

Kindly provide some inputs on how this can be achieved.

 

 

error message (incorrect CR type)to be displayed here in yellow section?

 

 

 

regards

Chandra.

entry.title: How to create a PIR with different unit and scale?
entry.content:
The supplier sent us this quotation. How could we set up the PIR and update the quotation for FG to the customer when we quote on a unit piece?

 

Price

1-20pcs : 1.632.540/LOT

21-50 pcs : 51.815/pc

51-120pcs : 44.954/pc

entry.title: Copy Version Master Data from Baseline to MD Specific Version with Advanced Filter
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm trying to do a Copy Version for Master Data, from Baseline version to a Master Data Specific Version, using an advanced filter. 

  • the MD that I'm trying to copy, has on key attributes: Product ID (key for MD Product), Location ID (key for MD Location) and another attribute called Source ID;
  • this is a Simple MD;
  • I'm trying to use a filter related to MD Product: Product Type; so I would like to copy only certain records that meet this requirement for Product IDs;

The Output is Master data type ZPTSOURCEPRODUCTION is not copied because of the incompatible filter. 

Thanks all for your time

entry.title: SAP ERROR MESSAGE M3332
entry.content:
Hi, I can't create a material because of this message. How can i solve it? My alternative UoM is not the same as base UoM.

Diagnosis

You have entered an alternative unit of measure that is the same as the base unit of measure. These units must be different.

Procedure

Only enter an alternative unit of measure if it differs from the base unit of measure. Otherwise, leave this field blank.

entry.title: How do we restrict the user assignments in SAP MDG Substitution? Do we have any enhancement option?
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We have a requirement in the SAP MDG CR approval process that the requestor should never be able to approve the change request even if he/she is part of the approval group. We have achieved this by implementing the MDG Agent determination BAdI. 

However, this does not fulfill the requirement 100%. Because, our customer uses the "Workflow Substitution" feature extensively in order to substitute another user to act on the change request actions during the vacation period etc. 

When we use the Workflow substitution, there is a possibility that the rule gets violated if the requestor is acting as substitution for the approver. 

So, do have any standard way of handling this requirement in the Workflow substitution or any standard enhancement option like BAdI in the Substitution?

Any input or information is very much appreciated.

entry.title: Adding BP roles via Migration Cockpit
entry.content:
Hi everyone, 

I'm currently trying to add some roles for several BP's (so adding massively), that are already in the system. 

Which objects, in the migration cockpit, should I use to proceed with that ?

entry.title: MDG document storeage
entry.content:
Dear community,

I have a question regarding documents on the change request.
Where are the documents physically stored in SAP? The table USMD1211 shows for which change request there are documents, but not where they are stored in the SAP memory. Is there a way to download the documents in bulk?

Regards

Isabelle

entry.title: S4 BAPI to Apply Vendor Block by POrg or CCode
entry.content:
In ECC, we have an auto-block vendor enhancement triggered by a BADI (in XK02, FK02, MK02) that works well. It employs a BDC to block by specific company code(s) or specific purchase org(s).

In S4, I'm programmatically applying a Central Vendor block via BTE Event 00001421 that calls BAPI_BUPA_CENTRAL_CHANGE. But I cannot find a BAPI to apply a vendor block by Purchase org or Company code. FM VENDOR_UPDATE is a direct table update and is not an option.

AI suggested this (see screen shot), but no such FM exists.

entry.title: Field DELI_SERV_TYPE & DELI_SERV_NUMBER of Entity AD_POSTAL are grayed out in MDG-M.
entry.content:
Hi Team , We are using S/4 HANA 2023 SP02 ON PREM solution and we are having an issue with our MDG application where Field DELI_SERV_TYPE & DELI_SERV_NUMBER of Entity AD_POSTAL are grayed out. Does anyone know what could be the reason and how to fix it. 

 

BR

Ajaya Kumar Mishra

entry.title: LSMW - RFBIDE00 - No data
entry.content:
Dear gurus,

I have a problem with an LSMW based in program RFBIDE00. All is correct until the end. When we try to create the batch input the message is that "the file doesn't contain data". However, in the step of read transactions I can see the values.

Could you help me? Why the generated batch input doesn't contain data?

Thanks in advance.

Best regards,

entry.title: PRAT1, PRAT2 Fields are not showing at MDG UI Level upon adding to Data model BP_SALES.
entry.content:
Product Attributes fields PRAT1,PRAT2...PRAT9 Are not showing at UI repository even after doing SMT Mapping and generation of structures upon data model extension?

although these fields can be seen at KNVV level.

entry.title: Can SAP MDG RFM Co-deploy with SAP Industry solution Article?
entry.content: Can I Implement SAP MDG RFM as Co-Deployment option on SAP S/4 HANA RISE Private Edition with Industry Solution Article.

entry.title: Email validation - functioning email account behind the address
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

we would like to automatically validate the email addresses in the master data (customer master) within an SAP system (using an embedded SAP MDG on top). This goes beyond a simple syntax check of the email addresses (e.g., ensuring an "@" is included, that it ends with a valid top-level domain like "sap.com," contains no special characters, etc.). We are also interested in verifying whether a functioning email account exists behind the address. Technically, this cannot of course always be determined with 100% certainty, as not all mail servers consistently return error messages when an email cannot be delivered to an account. However, we would view this as an additional heuristic data quality check, which, for example, could also be provided by third-party vendors (e.g. https://www.abstractapi.com/api/email-verification-validation-api). We are not aware of any standard functionality in the S/4HANA core and/or in SAP MDG, which is why our current approaches are based on extensibility and/or integration tools:

  • SAP Integration Suite: call to such an API in an existing flow
  • SAP Build Process Automation: via task automation and external action
  • ABAP (on-stack)/RAP: external HTTPS API call
  • Side-by-side app/middleware using an arbitrary programming language and/or framework (e.g. CAP)

Do you have any best practices, ideas, and/or experience to share in this topic? We would highly appreciate your feedback!

 

Best regards,
Nicolas

 

SAP S/4HANA SAP Master Data Governance SAP Business One Extensibility

entry.title: How do I assign BRF+ 'configuration' in the MDG Consolidation update process step?
entry.content: In setting up a new Master Data Consolidation process using an 'Update' step, I'm attempting to use BRF+.  All documentation says to just select the BRF+ checkbox for the relevant tables under 'Configure Process Models and Field Properties', which I've done.  How do I get the BRF+ rules assigned to the step?  There is nothing in the 'Configuration' dropdown, as shown in the screenshot.

entry.title: Bp replication based on supplier governance
entry.content:
Hi all,

Our client has implemented supplier,customer governance which inturn creates BPs also.

Now the requirement is to replicate BPs to another SAP system, my question is since we are using customer, supplier CRS in stead of BP cr type, is it possible to use SOA based replication? If yes pls share the steps to be followed on receiving system.

Thanks in advance..

Kumar.

entry.title: How to add custom attribute in Bankdata details SAP MDG
entry.content:
I am trying to add timestamp ZZTIMESTAMP field in BUT0BK table which will be displayed at UI level. Whenever user is creating/changing BP and he add/change Bank data then this custom attribute ZZTIMESTAMP will be updated by user.

This timestamp field will be available at Bankdata details at UI level whenever user is creating/changin BP in SAP MDG through CR.

I am unable to enhance standard structure for SMT mapping which is BUS_EI_BUPA_BANKDETAIL. 

There is similar post 

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/error-in-smt-mapping-adding-field-in-bank-details-mdg-supplier/qaq-p/10720445

But there is no concrete solution. Any solution on this where we can enhance Bankdetail Entity at UI level using custom attribute.

If respective staging and api structure can't be enhanced then if there is any solution where we can update the custom attribute using handler class. Can someone provide steps and sample code for the same will be really helpful.

We are using MDG co-deployment solution.

Thanks & Regards

Pratik Wankhade

entry.title: Supplier Personal number(emp no) not copying from one c.code to another c.code
entry.content:
Hi all,

I have supplier with personal number 1000 company code. 

When i am extending that vendor from 1000 c.code to 2000 c.code that personal number not copying.

My client requirement it should be copy that employee number of the supplier from one company code to another company code.

Kindly let me know...

Thanks for your valuable support.

entry.title: Export records with messages in validation step in spreadsheet format including all related messages
entry.content: In consolidation and mass processing of products, Export records with messages in validation step in spreadsheet format including all related messages are not working. Able to export all fields but not the error messages in the details field

entry.title: Conditional replication in mdg.bp
entry.content:
Hi team,

I have a requirement that by validating sales area /company code of BP,

1.I need to  replicate only the general data . I.e. no roles data etc.. only name and address should be sent out  I got toknow at thigh level segment filters of DRF to be used but please provide detail level steps..

2. What is the step in Drf to replicate immediately after final check approved 

 

Thanks in advance.

Kumar.

entry.title: LFA1 - WERKS Filed addition in MDG UI Screen
entry.content:
Hi All,

I'm added LAF1 - WERKS field in MDG UI Screen, While creation of new supplier ,the  Plant fields is Auto varnished.

I'm verified an sap note :  2221398 -  it say WERKS is not supported to MDG UI Screen.

But We required to save the data in LFA1- WERKS field, How to resolve my Issue.

Can someone please suggest me .

Thanks & Regards,

Guru.

SAP Community SAP Master Data Governance,
